summary: SEO/sitemap/robots/Helmet testing. Static assets (sitemap.xml with 12 URLs, robots.txt with Disallow:/admin and Sitemap directive, default index.html title/description) all valid. Dynamic per-route titles via react-helmet-async work for /, /mock-interviews, /about. OrgSchema JSON-LD present. Admin login regression passes. BUG: /jobs page does NOT update title or inject og:* / twitter:card meta tags — Jobs.jsx imports Seo but never renders <Seo />.
passed: Static index.html contains default <title>SkillEn — Learn. Grow. Lead.</title> and SkillEn description meta (visible without JS)
Home (/) document.title after hydration = 'Launch Your Career with Industry-Ready Skills · SkillEn'
/about title = 'About SkillEn — Bridging Education & Employability · SkillEn'
EducationalOrganization JSON-LD schema present in document.head (OrgSchema)
No Helmet-related console errors (0 console errors total during navigation)
Regression: admin login works (admin@skillen.in / SkillEn@2026) → redirects to /admin, skillen_token set in localStorage, dashboard renders

failed.issue: /jobs page does not set its per-route title, og:title, og:description, og:image, or twitter:card. document.title remains default 'SkillEn — Learn. Grow. Lead.' and meta[property=og:title] is absent.
failed.evidence: grep on /app/frontend/src/pages/Jobs.jsx shows `import Seo from "@/components/Seo";` on line 6 but NO `<Seo ... />` JSX render anywhere in the file. Playwright on /jobs returned: jobs_title='SkillEn — Learn. Grow. Lead.', jobs_og_title=None, jobs_twitter_card=False, jobs_og_image=False. Note App.js routes both /jobs and /internships to <Jobs />, so both routes are affected.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Jobs.jsx, actually render <Seo title="Live Jobs & Internships ..." description="..." /> at the top of the component JSX (currently only imported, never used). This will fix both /jobs and /internships routes since App.js maps both to the same Jobs component.
